meta.name: QQ Official Adapter (Official)
meta.description: QQ Official Bot gateway + OpenAPI adapter for ShinBot.
config.title: QQ Official Connection Settings
config.description: Configure QQ Official gateway connection and message bridge behavior.
config.fields.app_id.label: App ID
config.fields.app_secret.label: App Secret
config.fields.intents.label: Gateway Intents
config.fields.intents.description: Bitmask used in gateway identify payload
config.fields.sandbox.label: Sandbox Mode
config.fields.api_base.label: API Base URL
config.fields.api_base.description: Custom OpenAPI base URL (leave empty for official default)
config.fields.token_base.label: Token Base URL
config.fields.token_base.description: Base URL used to refresh app access token
config.fields.ws_url.label: Gateway URL Override
config.fields.ws_url.description: Fixed WebSocket URL; if empty the adapter calls /gateway/bot
config.fields.reconnect_delay.label: Reconnect Delay
config.fields.max_reconnects.label: Max Reconnects
config.fields.request_timeout.label: Request Timeout
config.fields.heartbeat_jitter.label: Heartbeat Jitter
config.fields.heartbeat_jitter.descripti: Randomized ratio applied before first heartbeat
config.fields.download_resources.label: Download Resources
config.fields.download_resources.descrip: Download media resources into local temp cache
config.fields.resource_cache_dir.label: Resource Cache Directory
config.fields.resource_cache_dir.descrip: Local cache directory for downloaded resources
